refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load→travel→dump cycle.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR included the phrase 'shall support achieving,' which can imply a solution approach. Replacing 'support achieving' with 'enable achieving' keeps the focus on the functional goal without implying how it is done, maintaining solution neutrality. The FR is atomic as it focuses solely on achieving the cycle time target for the specified cycle.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure the cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle under the agreed duty cycle and site conditions, and verify that the 95th percentile cycle time (p95) is less than or equal to the customer-defined target.
sub_frs: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the load phase of the cycle.
The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the travel phase of the cycle.
The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined cycle time target for the dump phase of the cycle.

candidate_dps: Optimize load handling mechanism to minimize load time
Optimize travel path and speed to minimize travel time
Optimize dump mechanism to minimize dump time
Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time
Implement adaptive cycle time control based on real-time conditions
selected_dp.selected_dp: Coordinate load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump operations timing
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically integrates the three sub-operations into a coordinated cycle, promoting independence of individual operation optimizations while enabling overall cycle time minimization.

assumptions_risks: Cycle time can be effectively decomposed into load, travel, and dump components
Operational policies and safety plans allow coordination optimization
Real-time conditions can be monitored and responded to if adaptive control is used
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicitly including real-time monitoring and adaptive control in the DP to handle variability in site conditions and ensure cycle time targets are met under all duty cycles.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Coordinates load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time across the system

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives vehicle status and sends operation progress data

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends coordinated commands to Vehicle and receives task updates

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and remote modules including Teleoperation and Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: Highly cohesive as it logically coordinates operations; minimal diffusion since coordination logic is centralized here.
Vehicle executes operations but coordination logic would be diffused across vehicle and other modules, reducing cohesion.
Teleoperation is more about remote control, not coordination of load/travel/dump cycles; poor containment.
Safety Services focus on alerts and safety, not operational coordination; very poor containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module is the most appropriate boundary to contain the DP because it is responsible for system-level coordination of operations, ensuring high cohesion and minimal diffusion of the coordination logic.
containment_risks: Potential complexity within NGHE Solution if coordination logic grows too large.
Dependency on accurate and timely data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules may cause coupling challenges.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: No revision recommended; DP is well contained within NGHE Solution. If diffusion issues arise, consider further modularizing coordination sub-functions within NGHE Solution.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The DP logically addresses the FR by focusing on coordinating load, travel, and dump operations to minimize total cycle time, directly supporting the customer-defined cycle time target.

diffusion_risks: Dependency on accurate and timely data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules may cause coupling challenges.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: The DP is well contained within the NGHE Solution module, which has high cohesion and minimal diffusion of coordination logic. Other modules have lower containment scores and higher diffusion, supporting the choice of NGHE Solution as the implementation boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification is feasible through measuring the cycle time p95 against the CT_target under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, as well as ensuring compliance with worksite safety plans and operational policies.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: The allocation of the DP to the NGHE Solution module is clear and appropriate, with well-defined external interfaces supporting necessary data exchange.

recommended_revisions: No revision recommended; DP is well contained within NGHE Solution. If diffusion issues arise, consider further modularizing coordination sub-functions within NGHE Solution.

decision.justification: All gates (FR->DP, DP->IM, FR->IM) have passed with strong justification: the DP logically addresses the FR, the DP is well contained within the NGHE Solution module minimizing diffusion risks, and verification of the FR allocation to the IM is feasible with clear allocation. Although there is a noted risk of coupling due to dependencies on Vehicle and Teleoperation modules, this is acknowledged and manageable within the current implementation boundary. Given the high safety criticality, the current decomposition is sufficiently detailed and stable to proceed without further sub-FR derivation at this time.

assumptions: The NGHE Solution module maintains high cohesion and minimal diffusion of coordination logic.
Dependencies on Vehicle and Teleoperation modules provide accurate and timely data as required.
open_risks: Potential coupling challenges due to dependencies on external modules (Vehicle and Teleoperation).
evidence_needed: Measurement of cycle time p95 against CT_target under agreed duty cycle and site conditions.
Verification of compliance with worksite safety plans and operational policies.
